{{ define "title" }}Blog | {{ .Site.Title }}{{ end }} {{ define "main" }} {{ partial "header_table.html" (dict "ctx" . "Title" "Blog") }} {{ .Content }} {{ $posts := where (where .Pages "Draft" false) "Params.language" "en" }} {{ if $posts }} {{ range $posts }} {{ partial "blog_entry_table.html" (dict "page" . "truncate" 120) }} {{ end }}
{{ else }} No entries for now! {{ end }} {{ partial "footer.html" . }} {{ end }}
